page.title: Conditionals with Unless, Provided That, and As Long As
page.subtitle_html: Conditionals with Unless, Provided That, and As Long As — B2 conditional alternatives to if: unless, provided that, and as long as.
page.subtitle_text: B2 conditional alternatives to if: unless, provided that, and as long as.
tags: Conditionals with Unless, Provided That, and As Long As

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Conditionals with Unless, Provided That, and As Long As: Conditionals with unless, provided that, and as long as gives precise B2 condition meanings: if not, only if, and while the condition remains true.","rules":[{"label":"Unless","text":"Unless usually means if not.","example":"Unless you hurry, you will miss the train."},{"label":"Provided that","text":"Provided that makes the condition explicit and restrictive.","example":"You can join provided that you register today."},{"label":"As long as","text":"As long as means only if the condition continues to be true.","example":"You can stay as long as you are quiet."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
